message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame sum + mean (4 cases)

Append 4 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame-level numeric
reductions:

- sum_basic: 3-row 2-col float frame, no nulls
- sum_with_nulls_skipna: column-positional nulls, default skipna=True
- mean_basic: 4-row 2-col float frame, exact arithmetic-mean answers
- mean_with_nulls_skipna: nulls in one column, skipna recovers the
  proper denominator

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.sum()/.mean() and emits expected_series), runs the Rust
DataFrame.sum()/.mean(), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. DataFrameSum and DataFrameMean were already
wired through the Series response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-5t1c2]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
